metrics.overall_must_match_recall: matched truth pairs where is_must_match=true divided by all truth pairs where is_must_match=true
metrics.must_match_recall_by_expected_layer: same as overall recall, grouped by expected_min_layer
metrics.ocr_dependent_recall: recall for expected_min_layer=ocr plus difficulty in [ocr_required, ocr_corrupted]
metrics.llm_adjudication_accuracy: correct final labels for expected_min_layer=llm_adjudication or difficulty=adjudication_required
metrics.partial_overlap_detection_rate: partial_overlap truth pairs or document_truth records detected as partial rather than full duplicate
metrics.review_queue_size: number of candidate pairs/pages requiring human review
metrics.candidate_explosion_rate: candidate pair count divided by truth_pair_count, grouped by mode
metrics.pages_ocr_attempted: implementation metric: pages routed to OCR
metrics.pages_ocr_usable: implementation metric: OCR text passes usable-text threshold
metrics.pages_still_weak_after_ocr: implementation metric: OCR attempted but quality remains weak
metrics.fallback_pages_selected: pages selected for vision fallback or fallback dry-run flag
metrics.human_review_decisions_saved: implementation metric: labels saved in UI review workflow
